summary: Implemented US-003 full-screen application shell: created src/ui/shell.ts with initShell() that grabs canvas/overlay elements, sizes canvas to viewport, and handles resize events; updated index.html with overlay div and fixed-position CSS for canvas and overlay; updated src/main.ts to call initShell(). All quality gates pass: lint, typecheck, 29 unit tests, 8 E2E tests (including US-001 regression tests).
